.clickable-icon.background: rgb(212, 208, 200) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box
.clickable-icon.box-shadow: rgb(10, 10, 10) -1px -1px 0px 0px inset, rgb(255, 255, 255) 1px 1px 0px 0px inset, rgb(128, 128, 128) -2px -2px 0px 0px inset, rgb(223, 223, 223) 2px 2px 0px 0px inset

.clickable-icon.graph-controls-button.background: rgb(212, 208, 200) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box
.clickable-icon.graph-controls-button.box-shadow: rgb(10, 10, 10) -1px -1px 0px 0px inset, rgb(255, 255, 255) 1px 1px 0px 0px inset, rgb(128, 128, 128) -2px -2px 0px 0px inset, rgb(223, 223, 223) 2px 2px 0px 0px inset

.metadata-container.background: rgb(212, 208, 200) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.status-bar.background: rgb(192, 192, 192) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.mod-active.workspace-leaf.box-shadow: rgb(10, 10, 10) -1px -1px 0px 0px inset, rgb(223, 223, 223) 1px 1px 0px 0px inset, rgb(128, 128, 128) -2px -2px 0px 0px inset, rgb(255, 255, 255) 2px 2px 0px 0px inset

div.mod-horizontal.mod-left-split.mod-si.background: rgb(236, 236, 236) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.mod-horizontal.mod-right-split.mod-s.background: rgb(236, 236, 236) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.workspace-leaf.background: rgb(236, 236, 236) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box
div.workspace-leaf.box-shadow: rgb(10, 10, 10) -1px -1px 0px 0px inset, rgb(223, 223, 223) 1px 1px 0px 0px inset, rgb(128, 128, 128) -2px -2px 0px 0px inset, rgb(255, 255, 255) 2px 2px 0px 0px inset

mark.background: rgb(116, 97, 25) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

pre.background: rgb(240, 240, 240) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

pre.language-js.background: rgb(240, 240, 240) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box
